name: Study 3: CKD Progression Incidence by Baseline CKD Stage (NSAID Arm)
description: CKD-stage-stratified progression incidence in NSAID initiators.

design_json.notes: Stratify by baseline CKD stage in analysis execution layer
design_json.description: Incidence rate of CKD progression (Stages 4-5/dialysis) in NSAID initiators with CKD, stratified by baseline CKD stage (1, 2, or 3). Assesses whether NSAID-associated progression risk varies by severity of baseline renal impairment.
